sections.heading: What is a Gallons per Square Foot Calculator?
sections.content: A Gallons per Square Foot Calculator helps you determine how much liquid is needed per square foot given a specific depth. It is useful for pools, tanks, coatings, landscaping, irrigation, and construction projects.

subSections.heading: Enter Depth / Height
subSections.content: Liquid depth in feet, inches, or yards.

subSections.heading: Click Calculate
subSections.content: Get gallons per square foot and total gallons instantly.

subSections.heading: Tip
subSections.content: Ensure units are consistent for accurate results.

subSections.heading: Instant Calculation
subSections.content: Gallons per square foot and total gallons.

subSections.heading: Cost Estimation
subSections.content: Calculates total cost if price per gallon is entered.

subSections.heading: Education
subSections.content: Understand area, depth, and volume relationships.

subSections.heading: Example 1 – Basic Volume
subSections.content: Base: 10 ft × 5 ft | Depth: 1 ft | Volume: 10 × 5 × 1 × 7.48052 ≈ 374 gallons | Gallons per sq ft: 374 ÷ (10 × 5) ≈ 7.48 gal/ft²

subSections.heading: Example 2 – Cost
subSections.content: Volume: 500 gallons | Price per gallon: $3 | Total Cost: 500 × 3 = $1,500

faq.q: What is a gallons per square foot calculator?
faq.a: It calculates gallons needed per square foot for a given depth.
Saves time and ensures accurate liquid volume planning.
Yes, ideal for any liquid-containing area.
Yes, total volume is displayed instantly.
Yes, helps plan water requirements for gardens and ponds.
Yes, enter price per gallon to get total cost.

faq.q: Does it account for uneven depth?
faq.a: No, it assumes flat, uniform depth.
Yes, works on smartphones, tablets, and desktops.
Yes, completely free with no downloads required.
